negative_memory.hypothesis_tested: fold-local intraday opening drive exhaustion fade rank over opening drive extension, drive efficiency loss, opening drive volume decay, opening extreme position, VWAP reversion pressure, counter body turn, adverse wick absorption, reclaim against drive strength, prior-day contrarian context, fade alignment, session phase maturity, and spread stress inverse features
negative_memory.next_boundary: C0107 R0001 shows the tested opening drive exhaustion fade surface is not a candidate as implemented; remaining C0107 variants would be adjacent tuning, so next work should choose a new major C0107 hypothesis without selected, economics-pass, runtime, materialization, ONNX, promotion, or live claims
negative_memory.reason_not_candidate: activity landed inside the target band, but proxy, closed-bar MT5 logic, aggregate MT5 tick, and fold-isolated MT5 tick evidence did not establish a candidate

supporting_lessons.summary: R0001 produced 0 profitable and 9 losing fold-isolated MT5 tick folds, total tick net PnL -192.33, and worst fold rw_005 net PnL -29.94.
Schedule replay mechanical parity passed with mismatch_count 0, so the weak result is not explained by proxy-vs-MT5 logic mismatch.
Tick execution improved closed-bar logic by 33.36 total net PnL across 8 better and 1 worse folds, but both logic and tick surfaces remained negative.
Native MQL signal logic, ONNX materialization, cost/slippage hardening, final sizing, and historical lineage debt remain unresolved; no stronger claim is created.

required_kpi_summary.remaining_work_classification: no_candidate; further C0107 work would be adjacent threshold, stop, target, hold, session, activity, spread, capital, or opening-drive-exhaustion-fade feature nudge tuning

hypothesis_variant.summary: fold-local intraday opening drive exhaustion fade rank run
hypothesis_variant.variant_boundary: C0107 R0001 tests whether an early-to-mid session opening drive that becomes overextended from the day open, loses path efficiency and participation, shows counter-body turn, and carries VWAP reversion pressure can form a target-first fade surface after realistic spread cost. It changes feature family, label conditioning, model context, and trade-logic state key from C0106 range acceptance failure reversal. It is not a threshold/window/SL/TP/session/spread/capital nudge, materialization step, ONNX step, selected claim, runtime claim, or retry-only run.

pre_open_decision.adjacent_tuning_rejection_reason: No C0106 thresholds, windows, stops, targets, sessions, spread gates, feature nudges, or capital sizing changes are used as the run question.

surface_distance_rationale.label: Target-first quality after opening drive exhaustion fade, not target-first quality after range acceptance failure reversal.
surface_distance_rationale.model: Fold-local linear opening drive exhaustion fade rank.
surface_distance_rationale.trade_logic: Top fold-local opening-drive-exhaustion-fade state scores per active day.
